---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for OpenScreen Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what workflow does it improve? Is it related to a frustration you're hitting today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you discarded them.

## Scope notes

- [ ] This affects the recording / capture path (ScreenCaptureKit)
- [ ] This affects the editor
- [ ] This affects the HUD / picker overlays
- [ ] macOS-only is acceptable

## Additional context

Mockups, references to similar tools, or links to related issues.
